etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "un-" + "worthy" from Old English "weorþ" (not deserving)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Experiencing undeserving/inadequate and unworthy calling for development support
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: undeserving → undeserving/inadequate → contemporary unworthy with developmental development
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: undeserving → undeserving/inadequate → unworthy → understanding development
